name: 格洛克18型 | 亡者之寝
nameZh: 格洛克18型 | 亡者之寝
descriptionEn: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. It has been painted using a hydrographic of skulls over a silver metallic paint base. Intimidation is the sincerest form of flattery
descriptionZh: 格洛克18型是把耐用的第一回合手枪，非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手，并且可以进行三连发爆炸开火。 这把武器以银色为外表，使用骷髅花纹进行了涂装。 恐吓是最真挚的奉承
